headline: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) Falls More Steeply Than Broader Market: What Investors Need to Know
summary: In the most recent trading session, Palo Alto Networks (PANW) closed at $173.21, indicating a -4.41% shift from the previous trading day.

headline: Shares of companies in the broader software sector are trading lower amid a pullback in sentiment after Q1 financial results and outlook comments from industry peers IBM and ServiceNow.
Palo Alto Networks Earnings Preview: What to Expect
summary: Palo Alto Networks is scheduled to release its fiscal third-quarter earnings soon, and analysts project earnings in line with the year-ago quarter.

headline: ServiceNow and IBM earnings reignite AI fears, sending software shares lower
summary: Investing.com -- Concerns about ServiceNow and IBM’s quarterly results have triggered a broad selloff across enterprise software on Thursday, with shares in the sector falling sharply in premarket trading.
